rag_rules: Fix unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations in AGREE annexes by tracing root causes or removing invalid clauses.
Place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees in component type scopes with visible feature names and concrete bounds.
generic_rules: Use only visible AADL features or declared helpers within AGREE annexes to avoid type errors.
Ensure component type contracts reference valid feature names and bounds for assumptions and guarantees.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE guarantees must use valid expressions with known types; avoid <error> type markers.
Component type contracts should define assumptions and guarantees using visible identifiers.
anti_patterns: Do not add architecture elements to fix AGREE type errors; instead, resolve references or remove invalid clauses.
Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type scopes; use implementation scopes for those.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
